_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Conduct analysis of target communications to identify essential information in support of organization objectives.
reference_document_element_description: Lead complex cross-functional analytical projects, coordinating data access, methodology alignment, and stakeholder communication across business units.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-003 (LS, cosine: 0.454), RC-T-008 (RC, cosine: 0.439).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.483). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [analysis, communications, conduct, essential, identify, information] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, across, alignment, analytical, business, communication] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.875, R=0.861). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Conduct analysis of target communications to identify essential information in s" and "Lead complex cross-functional analytical projects, coordinating data access, met" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.471 ≈ STS 0.483 (gap 0.012). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [analysis, communications, conduct, essential, identify, information]. WIDAI terms: [access, across, alignment, analytical, business, communication].
